84:
SELECT a.first_name, s."District Name"
FROM (
   SELECT CDSCode, AdmFName1 AS first_name FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
   UNION ALL
   SELECT CDSCode, AdmFName2 FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
   UNION ALL
   SELECT CDSCode, AdmFName3 FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
) a
JOIN schools s ON a.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
JOIN (
   SELECT first_name
   FROM (
      SELECT first_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt
      FROM (
         SELECT AdmFName1 AS first_name FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
         UNION ALL
         SELECT AdmFName2 FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
         UNION ALL
         SELECT AdmFName3 FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
      )
      GROUP BY first_name
      ORDER BY cnt DESC
      LIMIT 2
   )
) tr ON a.first_name = tr.first_name
ORDER BY tr.cnt DESC, a.first_name;	----- bird -----	california_schools

94:
SELECT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT min(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM loan l
      WHERE l.account_id = a.account_id
      GROUP BY l.account_id
      HAVING avg(l.payments) = (
          SELECT min(avg_sal)
          FROM (
              SELECT avg(l2.payments) AS avg_sal
              FROM client c2
              JOIN disp d2 ON c2.client_id = d2.client_id
              JOIN account a2 ON d2.account_id = a2.account_id
              JOIN loan l2 ON a2.account_id = l2.account_id
              WHERE c2.gender = 'F'
              GROUP BY c2.client_id
          )
      )
  );

SELECT (max_avg - min_avg) AS gap
FROM (

);	----- bird -----	financial

        WHEN marvel_cnt > dc_cnt THEN 'Marvel' 
        ELSE 'DC' 
    END AS more_publisher,
    ABS(marvel_cnt - dc_cnt) AS difference
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_cnt,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dc_cnt

);	----- bird -----	superhero

1482:
SELECT Segment, pct AS biggest_percentage_increase
FROM (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           ((y2013.Consumption - y2012.Consumption) * 100.0 / y2013.Consumption) AS pct
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y2012 ON y2012.CustomerID = c.CustomerID AND y2012.Date LIKE '2012%'
    JOIN yearmonth y2013 ON y2013.CustomerID = c.CustomerID AND y2013.Date LIKE '2013%'
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND y2012.Consumption IS NOT NULL
      AND y2013.Consumption IS NOT NULL
) 
ORDER BY pct DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct
FROM (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           ((y2013.Consumption - y2012.Consumption) * 100.0 / y2013.Consumption) AS pct
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y2012 ON y2012.CustomerID = c.CustomerID AND y2012.Date LIKE '2012%'
    JOIN yearmonth y2013 ON y2013.CustomerID = c.CustomerID AND y2013.Date LIKE '2013%'
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND y2012.Consumption IS NOT NULL
      AND y2013.Consumption IS NOT NULL
) 
ORDER BY pct ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

1526:
SELECT 
    (COALESCE(c2012,0) - COALESCE(c2013,0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(c2012,0),0) AS decrease_rate
FROM (
    SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS c2012
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE CustomerID = (
        SELECT CustomerID
        FROM transactions_1k
        WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8
    ) AND Date LIKE '2012%'
) AS y2012
JOIN (
    SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS c2013
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE CustomerID = (
        SELECT CustomerID
        FROM transactions_1k
        WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8
    ) AND Date LIKE '2013%'
) AS y2013;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
